rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component or implementation scope
Preserve AADL architecture by maintaining valid component type and implementation scopes
Use only visible identifiers in component type contracts
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex
generic_rules: Place component type contracts in the component type scope
Place implementation-level bindings in the implementation scope
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Avoid mixing assumed and actual types in declarations
Avoid placing implementation-level references in component type annexes
